properties.description: A table that links the spm_Category and the sp_Name tables

source: # SPM_dimriskfactor

#Imports
import json
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, count, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
from datetime import datetime
### Config Database

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "gold"
db_notebookname= "dim_risk_factor_gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']
#Set table name
db_tablename = "dim_risk_factor"
### Table Creation

# Create a table
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
        SPM_CategoryHashId string,
        SPM_NameHashId string,
        SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId string,
        RiskFactorNames string,
        RiskFactorNamesHashId string,
        SPM_Name_ID int,
        SPM_Category_ID int,
        StationName string,
        Capacity double,
        StartDate date,
        EndDate date,
        MLF double,
        AuxiliaryLoss double,
        NumberOfUnits double,
        Duration int,
        Category1 string,
        Category2 string,
        Category3 string,
        Category4 string,
        Category5 string,
        Category6 string,
        HashKey string,
        HashDiff string,
        CDCLoadDate timestamp,
        CDCStartDate timestamp,
        CDCEndDate timestamp,
        CDCCurrentFlag int,
        CDCOps int
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
### Load/Transform Data

#Load source data

# station table (silver)
station_table = "sharepoint_silver.spm_name"

# category table (silver)
category_table = "sharepoint_silver.spm_category"

# lacimariskfactor table (silver)
lacimariskfactor_table = "sharepoint_silver.spm_lacimariskfactor"

#Drop unnecessary columns in Station Table

df_s = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT *
    FROM {station_table}
""")
#.drop("ID", "FileName", "Lacima_loaddate")
#df_s.dtypes

#Drop unnecessary columns in Category Table

df_c = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT *
    FROM {category_table}
""")
#.drop("ID", "FileName", "Lacima_loaddate")
#df_c.dtypes

#Drop unnecessary columns in Lacimariskfactor Table

df_l = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT *
    FROM {lacimariskfactor_table}
""")
#.drop("ID", "FileName", "Lacima_loaddate")
#df_l.dtypes

# Join tables
df_gold = df_l.join(df_s, "SPM_NameHashId", "left").join(df_c, "SPM_CategoryHashId", "left")
#display(df_gold)

ms_comments.text: Should any ID columns be listed in the HashDiff

source:
# Add CDC columns
df_gold = df_gold.withColumns({
    "HashKey" : sha2(concat_ws("||", "SPM_CategoryHashId", "SPM_NameHashId", "SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId"), 256),
    "HashDiff" : sha2(concat_ws("||",
                                'RiskFactorNames',
                                'StationName',
                                'Capacity',
                                'StartDate',
                                'EndDate',
                                'MLF',
                                'AuxiliaryLoss',
                                'NumberOfUnits',
                                'Duration',
                                'Category1',
                                'Category2',
                                'Category3',
                                'Category4',
                                'Category5',
                                'Category6'
                                ), 256),
    "CDCLoadDate" : to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    "CDCStartDate" : to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    "CDCEndDate" : to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    "CDCCurrentFlag" : lit(1),
    "CDCOps" : lit(1)
### Create a TempView
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_gold.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view")
### Merge a TempView with the target table

# SCD2 logic
# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (SPM_CategoryHashId, SPM_NameHashId, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, RiskFactorNames, RiskFactorNamesHashId, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, HashKey, HashDiff, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCCurrentFlag, CDCOps)
      VALUES (s.SPM_CategoryHashId, s.SPM_NameHashId, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, s.RiskFactorNames, s.RiskFactorNamesHashId, s.SPM_Name_ID, s.SPM_Category_ID, s.StationName, s.Capacity, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.MLF, s.AuxiliaryLoss, s.NumberOfUnits, s.Duration, s.Category1, s.Category2, s.Category3, s.Category4, s.Category5, s.Category6, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.CDCOps)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (SPM_CategoryHashId, SPM_NameHashId, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, RiskFactorNames, RiskFactorNamesHashId, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, HashKey, HashDiff, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCCurrentFlag, CDCOps)
      VALUES (s.SPM_CategoryHashId, s.SPM_NameHashId, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, s.RiskFactorNames, s.RiskFactorNamesHashId, s.SPM_Name_ID, s.SPM_Category_ID, s.StationName, s.Capacity, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.MLF, s.AuxiliaryLoss, s.NumberOfUnits, s.Duration, s.Category1, s.Category2, s.Category3, s.Category4, s.Category5, s.Category6, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.CDCOps)
""")

column_order = [
        "SPM_CategoryHashId",
        "SPM_NameHashId",
        "SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId",
        "RiskFactorNames",
        "RiskFactorNamesHashId",
        "SPM_Name_ID",
        "SPM_Category_ID",
        "StationName",
        "Capacity",
        "StartDate",
        "EndDate",
        "MLF",
        "AuxiliaryLoss",
        "NumberOfUnits",
        "Duration",
        "Category1",
        "Category2",
        "Category3",
        "Category4",
        "Category5",
        "Category6",
        "HashKey",
        "HashDiff",
        "CDCLoadDate",
        "CDCStartDate",
        "CDCEndDate",
        "CDCCurrentFlag",
        "CDCOps"
### Load into Dedicated SQL
db_tablename_dedicated = "DimRiskFactor"

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

#order columns for Azure Synapse insert should match synapse table creation order.
df_gold=df_gold.select(*column_order)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
# Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
(df_gold.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename_dedicated}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode("overwrite")
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{db_tablename_dedicated}"""))
Gold_TotalRows=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_TotalRows,0,0,Gold_TotalRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
